name: baidu-search
tagline: ClawHub (218★): Search the web using Baidu AI Search Engine (BDSE). Use for live information, documentation, or research topics.
verdict: The usage instructions and the actual examples point to two different script paths (skills/baidu-search/scripts/search.py vs scripts/search.py) — follow the wrong one and the command just won't run. No version tracking either, and no stated boundary against other search skills. Security is fine.

highlights.summary: Usage section states the script path as 'skills/baidu-search/scripts/search.py' (line 25), but every Examples entry (e.g. line 40: python3 scripts/search.py '{"query":"人工智能"}') dro
Nowhere does the skill describe the shape of the script's output (JSON schema, fields, how results are presented) — only that a search happens.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / pointer-to-better-skill text anywhere in description or body, despite plausible misfire against other search-engine skills.
